current_owner: native Http* command graph and SocketCore
verification: HTTP downloads route through CurlDownloadCommand. Local smokes verified option propagation, HEAD metadata, byte-range GETs, resume from an existing partial file, unknown-length fallback, and 404 failure surfacing. notes: Native RPC HTTP server cleanup is complete as of CM-009.

current_owner: native HTTP plus native TLS abstraction

verification: FTP URLs route through CurlDownloadCommand. Credentials, transfer type, passive/active mode, proxy, timeout, range, resume, and completion use libcurl and the shared transfer boundary.

verification: FTPS URLs route through CurlDownloadCommand and set libcurl SSL transfer ownership. Native FTP/TLS interleaving is removed.

current_owner: native Sftp* command graph with direct libssh2

notes: Direct libssh2 remains possible only as a libcurl internal build dependency.

verification: SCP URLs are recognized as stream transfers and route through CurlDownloadCommand with libcurl credential and private-key handling.

verification: CurlDownloadCommand maps HTTP credentials and FTP-family credentials to libcurl. Native AuthConfig, AuthResolver, DefaultAuthResolver, AuthConfigFactory, and http-auth-challenge ownership were removed.

verification: CurlDownloadCommand maps no-netrc and netrc-path to libcurl. Native Netrc and NetrcAuthResolver were removed.
